You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.

    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

    Instruction: Cool an egg and put it into microwave
    

SCENE CAPTION:
The scene depicts a kitchen environment with various objects placed on a countertop and appliances nearby. The relevant objects for the task are identified and described below according to the domain types and the instruction “Cool an egg and put it into microwave”.

1. Objects and their types:
   - Receptacles:
     - Microwave: A black microwave oven with a control panel and digital display, positioned on a counter to the right of the scene. It is a receptacle and is not currently opened.
     - Fridge: A large dark grey refrigerator with a digital display showing freezer at -15°C and fridge at 5°C. It has a water/ice dispenser on the door. It is a receptacle and is currently closed.
     - Sink: Not visible in any of the provided images; therefore, it is not present or accessible in the current scene.
   - Objects (non-receptacles):
     - Egg: A single white egg is on the countertop near the center, between a red apple and a golden ladle. It is not currently held, cooled, or heated.
     - Knife: A knife with a black handle is lying on the countertop near the loaf of bread on the left. It is not currently held.
     - Other objects present but not relevant to the domain or instruction: two red apples, two loaves of bread, a green plastic tub, a metal bowl, a plate, a soap dispenser, a fork, and a ladle.

2. Quantities of each object type:
   - Microwave: 1
   - Fridge: 1
   - Egg: 1
   - Knife: 1
   - Other objects (not domain-relevant): multiple, including apples, bread, etc.

3. Spatial relationships:
   - The egg is on the countertop, positioned between a red apple and a ladle.
   - The knife is on the countertop to the left of the egg, near a loaf of bread.
   - The microwave is on a counter to the right of the main countertop area, adjacent to the fridge.
   - The fridge is immediately to the right of the microwave.
   - The agent (robot) is not at any object’s location initially; it must first navigate to one.

4. Current state of each object relevant to the planning task:
   - Egg: Not held, not cooled, not heated, not sliced. It is on the countertop.
   - Microwave: Closed, not opened, not toggled on. It is a receptacle and can hold the egg after cooling.
   - Fridge: Closed, not opened. It is a receptacle and can cool the egg.
   - Knife: On countertop, not held. Not needed for this task (cooling and microwaving an egg does not require slicing).

5. Colors, positions, and distinguishing features:
   - Egg: White, oval-shaped, located centrally on the countertop.
   - Microwave: Black, rectangular, with a digital control panel, located on the right counter.
   - Fridge: Dark grey, tall, with a digital temperature display and water dispenser on the front.
   - Knife: Black handle, metallic blade, lying horizontally on the left side of the countertop.
   - Countertop: Light beige, smooth surface with various objects arranged on it.
   - Floor: Tiled with light brown square tiles.

The robot must first navigate to the egg, pick it up, then go to the fridge, open it, cool the egg, close the fridge, then go to the microwave, open it, and place the cooled egg inside. The current state indicates no actions have been taken yet.

Based on the above scene caption, the images, and the instruction, generate the PDDL problem file.
Use the caption to understand what objects are present and their current state.
Make sure the PDDL problem accurately reflects the scene described in the caption.

Generate the PDDL problem:
attempts.response:
```pddl
(define (problem cool_egg_and_put_in_microwave)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        robot - agent
        microwave - microwave
        fridge - fridge
        egg - object
        knife - knife
    )
    (:init
        (not (atLocation robot microwave))
        (not (atLocation robot fridge))
        (not (atLocation robot egg))
        (not (atLocation robot knife))
        (not (opened microwave))
        (not (opened fridge))
        (not (holdsAny robot))
        (not (isCool egg))
        (not (isHot egg))
        (not (isSliced egg))
        (not (isClean egg))
        (not (isOn microwave))
        (not (isToggled microwave))
        (openable microwave)
        (openable fridge)
        (atLocation robot egg) ; Assuming the robot can start at the egg's location for simplicity, or it will need to GotoLocation first
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle egg microwave)
        (isCool egg)
    ))
)
```
attempts.problem:
(define (problem cool_egg_and_put_in_microwave)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        robot - agent
        microwave - microwave
        fridge - fridge
        egg - object
        knife - knife
    )
    (:init
        (not (atLocation robot microwave))
        (not (atLocation robot fridge))
        (not (atLocation robot egg))
        (not (atLocation robot knife))
        (not (opened microwave))
        (not (opened fridge))
        (not (holdsAny robot))
        (not (isCool egg))
        (not (isHot egg))
        (not (isSliced egg))
        (not (isClean egg))
        (not (isOn microwave))
        (not (isToggled microwave))
        (openable microwave)
        (openable fridge)
        (atLocation robot egg) ; Assuming the robot can start at the egg's location for simplicity, or it will need to GotoLocation first
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle egg microwave)
        (isCool egg)
    ))
)

    :precondition (and

            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

(define (problem cool_egg_and_put_in_microwave)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        robot - agent
        microwave - microwave
        fridge - fridge
        egg - object
        knife - knife
    )
    (:init

        (openable fridge)

        (not (opened fridge))

        (not (isCool egg))
        (not (isHot egg))
        (not (isSliced egg))
        (not (isClean egg))
        (not (isOn microwave))
        (not (isOn fridge))
        (not (inReceptacle egg microwave))
        (not (inReceptacle egg fridge))
        (atLocation robot egg) ; Initial location can be set to any object; here we start at egg for efficiency, but the problem allows GotoLocation to any object.
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle egg microwave)
        (isCool egg)
    ))
)

(define (problem cool_egg_and_put_in_microwave)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        robot - agent

final.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)
